
1축 (9.6 : 1)
pulse = (3200 * 9.6) / 360 = 85.333333
lead = 1
1/85.3333333 = 0.01171875000   => 1/n = 85.33333333333333
1000/85333   = 0.01171879577   => 1/n = 85.33300004766616 
* lead  = 1000
* pulse = 85333 
* Scale = 1000/85333 = 85.33300004766616

2축 (3 : 1)
pulse = (3200 * 3) / 360 = 26.6666  
lead = 1
1/26.6666   = 0.037500000
1000/26666  = 0.037500937
* lead  = 1000
* pulse = 26666
* Scale = 1000/26666 = 0.037500937 

3축 (1.5 : 1) lead=1mm 
pulse = (3200 * 1.5) = 4800 
lead = 1 
1/4800 = 0.000208333333
* lead  = 1
* pulse = 4800 
* Scale = 1 / 4800 = 0.000208333333
